heading: General management plan
label: 410vv–7 General management plan
text: Not later than 3 complete fiscal years after , the Secretary shall develop and transmit a general management plan for the park to the Committee on Natural Resources of the United States House of Representatives and to the Committee on Energy and Natural Resources of the United States Senate.August 26, 1992
notes: Amendments1994— substituted “Natural Resources” for “Interior and Insular Affairs” after “Committee on”.Pub. L. 103–437
amendments: Amendments1994— substituted “Natural Resources” for “Interior and Insular Affairs” after “Committee on”.Pub. L. 103–437
